text:
OK. Maybe I'll tell you about my favorite uncle.

He had this thick mustache. You could cut it. I did. It smelled like smoke. He used to take me camping.

Once we were there in the woods. There was a creek. I thought it was big rocks.

We build a campfire. My uncle took out a big stick. Looked scary.

We carved faces. I drew a wolf. His looked like Grim Reaper.

We burned sticks. Made fireworks. We threw them. Boom!

We're quiet. Saw fireflies.

Then I saw something like bugs. Lighted branches?

No. Caterpillars!

We dug them up. You couldn't tell.

Next morning dove flew away.

We looked.
